mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT trace_code) FROM trace_snapshot) AS total_traces,
(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT trace_code) FROM trace_snapshot WHERE last_event_time >= CURDATE() AND last_event_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS today_new, COUNT(*) AS total_logs, SUM(CASE WHEN action_type IN ('EXCEPTION','EXCEPTION_OPEN') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS exception_count FROM trace_lifecycle_log WHERE 1=1

SELECT province AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM trace_lifecycle_log WHERE province IS NOT NULL AND province != ''
GROUP BY province ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 50

choose.when: SELECT HOUR(event_time) AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM trace_lifecycle_log WHERE DATE(event_time) = CURDATE() GROUP BY HOUR(event_time) ORDER BY label

SELECT event_date AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(event_time, '%m-%d') AS event_date FROM trace_lifecycle_log WHERE event_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ) t GROUP BY event_date ORDER BY event_date
choose.otherwise:
SELECT event_date AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(event_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS event_date FROM trace_lifecycle_log WHERE 1=1
AND event_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
AND event_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
) t GROUP BY event_date ORDER BY event_date

mapper.select:
SELECT from_node AS source, to_node AS target, COUNT(*) AS edge_weight FROM trace_lifecycle_log WHERE from_node IS NOT NULL AND from_node != '' AND to_node IS NOT NULL AND to_node != ''
AND trace_code = #{traceCode}
GROUP BY from_node, to_node
ORDER BY edge_weight DESC LIMIT 200
